plans.summary: Azure Managed Experience is an ongoing cloud infrastructure managed services offering provided direc
plans.description: Azure Managed Experience allows you to focus on your business outcomes by having the same people who build and operate Microsoft Azure manage your Azure environment. It offers an ideal cloud managed experience for enterprises who are looking for a partner with the deepest level of Azure expertise and who can work as an extension of their team to help advance their cloud journey. You’ll be working directly with Azure engineers who are committed to leading and optimizing your cloud operations with a set of modern capabilities including incidence-avoidance tools powered by fully-visible monitoring and alerting metrics, enhanced engineering hours, AI-based problem management, etc.

plans.summary: Microsoft GBB or CET-led customer engagement to develop an MVP.
plans.description: PLAN: Through this service, Microsoft's Global Black Belt team or Microsoft's Customer Engineering team will engage with you on a predetermined subject. Through this process, you we'll work with you to ideate and iterate on solutions, and then work with you to develop a minimum viable product that helps you maximize your competitive advantage, unlock previously inaccessible business opportunities, and which you can evolve and grow.

value.summary: End-to-end review of an application built on Azure, to identify risks
value.description: A structured review designed to identify key risks to the health of an application deployed on Azure while providing actionable recommendations to address areas of concern and enhance resiliency. The review is conducted through a workshop lasting 1-2 days and covers a broad range of technical topics through a focused resiliency lens, to assess the end-to-end resiliency of the application and its design trajectory. A report capturing key findings and associated recommendations will be produced to support the accommodation of critical resiliency optimizations.

plans.summary: Create a Lab that contains your team's templates and policies.
plans.description:
DevTest Labs enables development teams to efficiently self-manage virtual machines (VMs) and Azure resource manager (ARM) based resources while staying within security policies and guardrails defined by central admins. Developers can create resources from pre-configured templates with the latest software bits and IT approved tools in minutes as opposed to waiting for days or weeks. Central admins on the other hand, can embed policies, budgets and schedules on these resources to minimize waste and control costs.

  • Quickly provision virtual machines and Azure services (ARM based) for development and testing
  • Easily integrate your deployment pipeline with DevTest Labs to provision on-demand environments.
  • Get going quickly using virtual machines from pre-created pools
  • Minimize wastes with lab, virtual machine level quotas and policies
  • Set automated shutdowns to minimize costs

plans.summary: Azure Attestation is a freely available service.
plans.description: Azure Attestation is a freely available service.

value.longSummary: A unified solution for remotely verifying the trustworthiness of a platform.
value.summary: A unified solution for remotely verifying the trustworthiness of a platform.
value.description:
Azure Attestation is a unified solution for remotely verifying the trustworthiness of a platform and integrity of the binaries running inside it. The service receives evidence from the platform, validates it with security standards, evaluates it against configurable policies, and produces an attestation token for claims-based applications (e.g., relying parties, auditing authorities).

Azure Attestation offers the following benefits:

  • Supports attestation of multiple platforms
  • Offers default providers to simplify the attestation process
  • Allows creation of custom providers with user-defined policies

plans.description:
Threat Protection Systems provides agile and efficient protection against the full spectrum of distributed denial of service (DDoS) attacks, including the challenging multi-vector attacks, which use a combination of high rate volumetric or network protocol attacks, and more sophisticated application attacks.

The virtual appliances is built to meet the growing needs of organizations that require a flexible and easy-to-deploy DDoS Protection solution that protects their cloud-based workloads and services. Each vThunder TPS instance has the full set of DDoS protection features and is highly customizable to match your service protection needs.


In this topology, Appliance will be positioned inline in order to inspect all inbound traffic and apply countermeasures as configured by the administrator. Outbound traffic from server VMs does not need to go through Appliance .

plans.summary: F5 web application firewall security for Microsoft Azure-based applications
plans.description:
Enable compliance and better protect your applications with the F5 web application firewall solution, which delivers:

  • Protection from common application vulnerabilities
  • Defense against OWASP Top 10 threats and layer 7 DDoS attacks
  • Compliance with PCI-DSS requirements
  • High application performance without compromises
Designed to run as a pre-configured service within the Azure Security Center

The F5 web application firewall solution (in preview) is built using the industry-proven F5 BIG-IP Application Security Manager and BIG-IP Local Traffic Manager technologies. By activating this solution within the Azure Security Center, you can realize the benefits of BIG-IP products, as well as customize the configuration to satisfy the unique needs of your application or organizational policies.


 

ROME not ROME - v1.0.8

 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The F5 web application firewall solution leverages industry-proven and ICSA-certified BIG-IP Application Security Manager (ASM) and BIG-IP Local Traffic Manager (LTM) technologies as a pre-configured virtual solution within Azure Security Center.

This preview is currently offered at no charge using a BIG-IP Evaluation license and must be launched through the Azure Security Center.

For more information, visit f5.com.

plans.summary: Microsoft published Jenkins Master on a Linux (Ubuntu) VM
plans.description:
We are excited to bring the next phase of our support for Jenkins on Microsoft Azure with the launch of a secure, stable and production ready version of Jenkins.

Note: For instructions on connecting to this Jenkins instance once deployed, please browse to the URL or public IP of this instance. The URL is the Domain name label you enter in Settings and the suffix shown below this field.

This solution template will install the latest stable Jenkins version on a Linux (Ubuntu 14.04 LTS) VM along with tools and plugins configured to work with Azure. This includes –

  • git for source control
  • Azure Credentials plugin for connecting securely
  • Azure VM Agents plugin for elastic build, test and continuous integration
  • Azure Storage plugin for storing artifacts
  • Azure CLI to deploy apps using scripts

For a detailed walkthrough of the steps this solution automates for you, please visit our blog post.


This solution template is designed to configure a Jenkins instance following best practices with minimal Azure knowledge. With a handful of user inputs and a simple single-click deployment through the Azure portal, you can provision a fully configured Jenkins instance in minutes, which can use Azure services anywhere across the globe.

value.longSummary: Deploy and configure a secure, stable and production ready version of Jenkins on Azure in a matter of minutes

plans.description:
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP1 - optimized for High Performance Compute (Premium Image - PRIORITY Support)

Confidently run your production workloads on SUSE Linux Enterprise Server on Microsoft Azure, knowing that your service levels are guaranteed, and that help from SUSE and Microsoft engineers, if you need it, is just a phone call away.

SUSE Linux Enterprise Server is the only supported Enterprise Linux distribution available on Microsoft Azure, and the only one supported with tools like SUSE Studio for quick and easy image creation, and SUSE Manager for monitoring and managing your Linux virtual machines using Microsoft Systems Center.

This Premium image with PRIORITY support includes updates, patches, and support through 24x7 web, email, chat and phone from SUSE. Virtual machines created from this image incur per-hour support fees, in addition to Azure platform fees. An Azure support plan is required (developer or above). Support incidents are initiated through Azure Support.

This image supports the low latency network interface option (RDMA) available for select instance types.

Legal Terms

By clicking the Create button, I acknowledge that I am getting this software from MarketPlace Test and that the legal terms of MarketPlace Test apply to it. Microsoft does not provide rights for third-party software. Also see the privacy statement from MarketPlace Test.

plans.description:
SUSE Manager 3.0 Server

Built for Linux, SUSE Manager delivers best-in-class open source infrastructure management capabilities that empowers IT to reduce complexity and regain control of IT assets by enabling you to comprehensively manage Linux systems with a single, centralized solution. SUSE Manager provides automated and cost-effective software, asset, patch and configuration management, as well as, system provisioning and monitoring capabilities. These capabilities enable you to easily manage your enterprise Linux system deployments across physical, virtual and cloud environments. As a result, your organization can decrease total cost of ownership while securing enterprise systems and improving compliance and service quality.

SUSE Manager Proxy caches software packages on an internal, central server. The proxy caches patch updates from SUSE or custom RPMs generated by third-party organizations. A proxy allows to use bandwidth more effectively because client systems connect to the proxy for updates, and the SUSE Manager server is no longer required to handle all client requests.

Instances of BYOS (bring your own subscription) images must be registered using your SUSE subscription keys in order to receive security updates and support.

Legal Terms

By clicking the Create button, I acknowledge that I am getting this software from Marketplace Test and that the legal terms of Marketplace Test apply to it. Microsoft does not provide rights for third-party software. Also see the privacy statement from Marketplace Test.

Built for Linux, SUSE Manager delivers best-in-class open source infrastructure management capabilities that empowers IT to reduce complexity and regain control of IT assets by enabling you to comprehensively manage Linux systems with a single, centralized solution. SUSE Manager provides automated and cost-effective software, asset, patch and configuration management, as well as, system provisioning and monitoring capabilities. These capabilities enable you to easily manage your enterprise Linux system deployments across physical, virtual and cloud environments. As a result, your organization can decrease total cost of ownership while securing enterprise systems and improving compliance and service quality.

SUSE Manager Proxy caches software packages on an internal, central server. The proxy caches patch updates from SUSE or custom RPMs generated by third-party organizations. A proxy allows to use bandwidth more effectively because client systems connect to the proxy for updates, and the SUSE Manager server is no longer required to handle all client requests.

Instances of BYOS (bring your own subscription) images must be registered using your SUSE subscription keys in order to receive security updates and support.

Legal Terms

By clicking the Create button, I acknowledge that I am getting this software from Marketplace Test and that the legal terms of Marketplace Test apply to it. Microsoft does not provide rights for third-party software. Also see the privacy statement from Marketplace Test.

plans.displayName: Versio™ Playout Gamma in the Cloud platform. (Staged)
plans.description:
Channel playout is a critically important function in the broadcast workflow, creating and defining the playout of video content and advertising that defines the channel for the viewing audience. Versio is an evolution and extension of Imagine Communications’ VersioTM platform, with disruptive new technology that utilizes all of Versio’s power and capabilities — but in the cloud. Versio provides powerful new tools that enable specialty or pop-up channels and business continuity applications in a virtualized master control environment. Providing the ultimate competitive advantage for all parties in the broadcast workflow, Versio simplifies the creation and management of channels and enables media companies to extend their brands and content with more freedom, visibility, and control than ever before. By integrating cloud-based playout and hybrid baseband and IP transport, Versio enables comprehensive capabilities to substantially improve playout and workflow challenges, and to facilitate the migration to IP.
Versio™ Playout Gamma in the Cloud platform.

plans.description:
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 11 Service Pack 4 (PRIORITY Support)

Confidently run your production workloads on SUSE Linux Enterprise Server on Microsoft Azure, knowing that your service levels are guaranteed, and that help from SUSE and Microsoft engineers, if you need it, is just a phone call away.

SUSE Linux Enterprise Server is a world-class, secure open source server operating system, built to power physical, virtual and cloud-based mission-critical workloads. SUSE Linux Enterprise Server was the first supported Enterprise Linux distribution available on Microsoft Azure. For ease of management integrate your instances with SUSE Manager for monitoring and managing your Linux virtual machines along side physical machines and other systems in your environment or integrate your instances with Microsoft Systems Center.

Priority support includes updates, patches, and support through 24x7 web, email, chat and phone from Microsoft and SUSE. Virtual machines created from this image incur per-hour support fees, in addition to Azure platform fees. An Azure support plan is required (developer or above). Support incidents are initiated through Azure Support.

Use of subscription credits with this offer

  • Free trial or monthly credits cannot be applied towards this service.
  • Enterprise Agreement commitment funds will be applied towards this service.

Legal Terms

By clicking the Create button, I acknowledge that I am getting this software from marketplace-test and that the legal terms of marketplace-test apply to it. Microsoft does not provide rights for third-party software. Also see the privacy statement from marketplace-test.

plans.displayName: SUSE Linux Enterprise Server (SLES) 12 SP4 for SAP Applications (Staged)
plans.description:
The leading Linux platform for SAP HANA, SAP NetWeaver and SAP S/4HANA solutions, with Priority (24x7) support based on the modular approach of SLES that paves the way for IT transformation in the software-defined era.

Pay-as-you-go image with Priority Support, which includes updates, patches, and support through 24x7 web, email, chat and phone from Microsoft and SUSE.

Virtual machines created from this image incur per-hour support fees, in addition to Azure platform fees. An Azure support plan is required (developer or above). Support incidents are initiated through Azure Support.

70% of all SAP applications running on Linux run on SUSE Linux Enterprise Server (SLES), including more than 90% of SAP HANA deployments. Get the most from your SAP HANA and SAP business application software with decreased downtime, greater operating efficiency and accelerated innovation with the reliability, availability and service ability of SUSE Linux Enterprise Server for SAP Applications.

Key Features:

  • Built-in high-availability clustering for reduced downtime
  • Automated failover for SAP HANA database
  • Full system rollback including service pack updates for fast error recovery
  • SAP HANA database firewall secures in-memory data
  • Installation wizard fully automates SAP HANA and NetWeaver installations
  • Page cache limit sustains SAP application performance
  • Linux containers with Docker for automated application deployment
  • Seamless priority support from SAP and SUSE

Legal Terms

By clicking the Create button, I acknowledge that I am getting this software from marketplace-test and that the legal terms of marketplace-test apply to it. Microsoft does not provide rights for third-party software. Also see the privacy statement from marketplace-test.

plans.displayName: Windows 10 Enterprise for Virtual Desktops Preview, Version 1809 (Staged)
plans.summary: Windows 10 Enterprise for Virtual Desktops Preview, Version 1809
plans.description:
Windows 10 Enterprise for Virtual Desktop is a multi-user Windows 10 capability enabled only by the Windows Virtual Desktop service. Both the service and the multi-user capability are available in private preview. Windows 10 multi-user capability is only available on Azure and, even then, only when used with the Windows Virtual Desktop service.

Windows Virtual Desktop is a managed desktop and application virtualization service hosted on Azure. Windows Virtual Desktop delivers the best virtual desktop experience by providing remote access to modern desktop and applications from any device. Combined with Microsoft 365 and Azure, it provides users with multi-session Windows 10 and Office 365 ProPlus, a secure computing experience with unmatched scale and reduced IT costs.

Access to Windows Virtual Desktop comes at no additional charge for Microsoft 365 E3 and E5, and Windows E3 and E5 customers. Once you have the appropriate licenses, set up an Azure subscription (or use an existing one), and you’re ready to quickly deploy and manage your modern desktops and apps.

plans.summary: Databricks provides a unified analytics platform that unifies data science, engineering and business
plans.description: Databricks is a truly unified approach to data analytics at scale. Founded by the team who created apache spark, Databricks provides a unified analytics platform that accelerates innovation by unifying data science, engineering, and business. By virtualizing storage, Databricks enables access to data anywhere. Databricks offers a highly secure and reliable production environment in the cloud, managed and supported by Spark experts. Through a collaborative and integrated environment, Databricks democratizes and streamlines the process of exploring data, prototyping, and operationalizing data-driven applications in Spark. Databricks provides a flexible job scheduler that enables a seamless transition from prototyping to production deployment without incremental work. Databricks empowers enterprises with security-enabled data democratization so that they can confidently build advanced analytics solutions when security considerations are paramount.

value.longSummary: Databricks, founded by the team that created Apache Spark, provides a unified analytics platform that accelerates innovation by unifying data science, engineering and business.
value.summary: Databricks provides a unified analytics platform that unifies data science, engineering and business
value.description:
DATABRICKS IS A TRULY UNIFIED APPROACH TO DATA ANALYTICS AT SCALE

Founded by the team who created Apache Spark, Databricks provides a Unified Analytics Platform that accelerates innovation by unifying data science, engineering, and business.



UNIFIED EXPERIENCE ACROSS TEAMS

A collaborative workspace for data science teams to work with data engineering and lines of business.



UNIFIED ANALYTICS WORKFLOWS

One environment from data preparation to exploration and model building to production.



UNIFIED INFRASTRUCTURE

Fully managed, serverless cloud infrastructure for isolation, automation, and cost control.

plans.summary: Oracle Database 12c Enterprise Edition (12.1.0.2.0) is a next-generation database designed for the cloud.
plans.description:
Oracle Database 12c Enterprise Edition (12.1.0.2.0) is a next-generation database designed for the cloud. It offers more than 500 new features including a new multitenant architecture that simplifies consolidating databases onto the cloud and enables customers to manage many databases as one without changing their applications. Customers can choose a wide range of Oracle Database Enterprise Edition options to deliver on business users' performance, security, big data, cloud, and availability service-level expectations.

This image is a Bring-Your-Own-License image that assumes you have already procured the appropriate licenses with Oracle and are properly licensed to run this image in Microsoft Azure.

plans.summary: Oracle Linux 6 brings the latest Linux innovations to market, delivering extreme performance, advanced scalability, and reliability.
plans.description:
The Oracle Linux operating system is engineered for open cloud infrastructure. It delivers leading performance, scalability and reliability for enterprise SaaS and PaaS workloads as well as traditional enterprise applications.

Oracle Linux with the Unbreakable Enterprise Kernel is developed and tested to support demanding enterprise workloads, such as Oracle Database. Additionally, with Oracle Linux Support, customers can benefit from Oracle Ksplice for zero-downtime kernel and user space updates, comprehensive kernel and application tracing with DTrace, and more. Unlike many other commercial Linux distributions, Oracle Linux is completely free to download, use, distribute and update.

Pricing:

Oracle provides license mobility for customers who want to run Oracle software on Microsoft Azure - giving customers greater deployment flexibility and choice. For more details, see the FAQ below.

plans.description:
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP1 - optimized for High Performance Compute

Confidently run your production workloads on SUSE Linux Enterprise Server on Microsoft Azure, knowing that your service levels are guaranteed, and that help from SUSE and Microsoft engineers, if you need it, is just a phone call away.

SUSE Linux Enterprise Server is the only supported Enterprise Linux distribution available on Microsoft Azure, and the only one supported with tools like SUSE Studio for quick and easy image creation, and SUSE Manager for monitoring and managing your Linux virtual machines using Microsoft Systems Center.

This image supports the low latency network interface option (RDMA) available for select instance types.

plans.description:
SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP1 - optimized for High Performance Compute (Premium Image - PRIORITY Support)

Confidently run your production workloads on SUSE Linux Enterprise Server on Microsoft Azure, knowing that your service levels are guaranteed, and that help from SUSE and Microsoft engineers, if you need it, is just a phone call away.

SUSE Linux Enterprise Server is the only supported Enterprise Linux distribution available on Microsoft Azure, and the only one supported with tools like SUSE Studio for quick and easy image creation, and SUSE Manager for monitoring and managing your Linux virtual machines using Microsoft Systems Center.

This Premium image with PRIORITY support includes updates, patches, and support through 24x7 web, email, chat and phone from SUSE. Virtual machines created from this image incur per-hour support fees, in addition to Azure platform fees. An Azure support plan is required (developer or above). Support incidents are initiated through Azure Support.

This image supports the low latency network interface option (RDMA) available for select instance types.

plans.description:
SUSE Manager 3.0 Server

Built for Linux, SUSE Manager delivers best-in-class open source infrastructure management capabilities that empowers IT to reduce complexity and regain control of IT assets by enabling you to comprehensively manage Linux systems with a single, centralized solution. SUSE Manager provides automated and cost-effective software, asset, patch and configuration management, as well as, system provisioning and monitoring capabilities. These capabilities enable you to easily manage your enterprise Linux system deployments across physical, virtual and cloud environments. As a result, your organization can decrease total cost of ownership while securing enterprise systems and improving compliance and service quality.

SUSE Manager Proxy caches software packages on an internal, central server. The proxy caches patch updates from SUSE or custom RPMs generated by third-party organizations. A proxy allows to use bandwidth more effectively because client systems connect to the proxy for updates, and the SUSE Manager server is no longer required to handle all client requests.

Instances of BYOS (bring your own subscription) images must be registered using your SUSE subscription keys in order to receive security updates and support.

plans.displayName: Visual Studio Community 2015 Update 3 with Universal Windows Tools and Azure SDK 2.9 on Windows 10 Enterprise N (x64)
plans.description:
This image contains a full install of Visual Studio Community 2015 Update 3 on Windows 10 Enterprise N (Fall Creators Update (RS3)), including the latest Universal Windows app development tools, the Anniversary Update Windows 10 SDK, and the latest Azure SDK. It allows you to quickly setup environment in Azure to develop and test applications targeting the Universal Windows Platform.

This image was created from the latest bits available on 6/21/2018.

The Visual Studio software is preinstalled in this VM, but you must acquire a Visual Studio subscription separately which allows you to sign in to and run Visual Studio on this VM.

With Visual Studio Enterprise you can create applications across devices and services, using an integrated, end-to-end DevOps solution for productivity and coordination across teams of any size. You get the tools you need to design, build, deploy and manage desktop, Windows Store, Windows Phone, and Office apps, as well as mobile and web apps across any device, web site, cloud service, and more. This image contains the recommended product install of the originally released (or 'RTW') version of Visual Studio Enterprise 2017 on Windows 10 Enterprise N (Fall Creators Update (RS3)). It allows you to easily and quickly set up a development environment in Azure to build and test applications using Visual Studio.

This image was created from the latest bits available on 6/21/2018.

The Visual Studio software is preinstalled in this VM, but you must acquire a Visual Studio subscription separately which allows you to sign in to and run Visual Studio on this VM.

value.description:
This image contains a full install of Visual Studio Community 2015 Update 3 on Windows 10 Enterprise N (Fall Creators Update (RS3)), including the latest Universal Windows app development tools, the Anniversary Update Windows 10 SDK, and the latest Azure SDK. It allows you to quickly setup environment in Azure to develop and test applications targeting the Universal Windows Platform.

This image was created from the latest bits available on 6/21/2018.

The Visual Studio software is preinstalled in this VM, but you must acquire a Visual Studio subscription separately which allows you to sign in to and run Visual Studio on this VM.

value.summary: Microsoft Windows Server Virtual Machine Images
value.description:
Windows Server is the operating system that bridges on-premises environments with Azure services enabling hybrid scenarios and maximizing existing investments, including:

  • Unique hybrid capabilities with Azure to extend your datacenter and maximize investments
  • Advanced multi-layer security to help you elevate your security posture
  • Faster innovation for applications enabling Developers and IT Pros to create new and modernize their apps, and
  • Unprecedented Hyper-converged Infrastructure to evolve your datacenter infrastructure

Available Images

Windows Server 2019 is the latest Long-Term Servicing Channel (LTSC) release with five years of mainstream support + five years of extended support. Choose the image that is right for your application needs.

Latest: Windows Server 2019

  • Server with Desktop Experience includes all roles including the graphical user interface(GUI)
  • Server Core omits the GUI for a smaller OS footprint, or
  • Containers option with both Nano and Server Core containers pre-installed on Server with Desktop Experience, or Server Core.

Windows Server Semi-Annual Channel releases deliver new operating system capabilities at a faster pace and are based on the Server Core installation option of the Datacenter edition. A new release comes out every six months and is supported for 18 months. Check the Lifecycle Support Page for support dates and always use the latest release if possible.


Click Get It Now to see the full list of available images.

Terms of Use

Your use of the Windows Server images from Azure Marketplace Virtual Machine Gallery are provided to you for use with virtual machine instances under your Azure subscription which are governed by the Online Services Terms. These virtual machine instances are limited for use with Azure. All Server images, including Semi-Annual Channel releases, may be used under the Azure Hybrid Benefit for Windows Server.

Learn more

Windows Server Virtual Machine Documentation
Windows Server Documentation
What's New in Windows Server

plans.summary: Windows Server, version 1803 is a Semi-Annual Channel release offering a smaller container image size and better application compatibility.
plans.description:
Note: This image comes with a 30GB OS Disk

Windows Server, version 1803 is a Semi-Annual Channel released based on the Server Core installation option of the Datacenter edition. This release is designed to help modernize your applications with container and micro-services and streamline your transition to the cloud. Advancements include improvements to the Server Core and Nano Server base container images, support for tools such as Curl.exe, Tar.exe, and SSH for building and debugging scenarios, improvements to WSL, and much more.

value.description:
Enterprises, governments, and organizations of all sizes find business solutions, innovative technology, and enablement services through the Azure Marketplace and AppSource web stores, Azure portal's in-product experience, Cloud Solution Providers, and Microsoft Sales teams.

Partner Center is the hub of a Microsoft partner's experience. For organizations who go to market with Microsoft and take advantage of the marketplace, Partner Center is the portal through which publishers create and manage offers, provide test drive demonstrations, and view analytics on offer performance.

plans.summary: A single sentence summarizing the purpose or function of the offer
plans.description:
With the transition to Partner Center, new functionality is available to publishers, in addition to improvements on the user experience. SaaS offerings, which can be billed monthly or annually, support per-user licensing (seat-based) in addition to per-site licensing (flat-rate). This new monetization model is ideal for business software. The introduction of SaaS per-user licensing aligns with new functionality that allows customers to complete purchases in AppSource, the Microsoft commercial marketplace for business and industry solutions.

Legal Terms

By clicking the Create button, I acknowledge that I am getting this software from prod-test-corevm and that the legal terms of prod-test-corevm apply to it. Microsoft does not provide rights for third-party software. Also see the privacy statement from prod-test-corevm.

Welcome to the Commercial Marketplace Portal in Partner Center. The Commercial Marketplace portal helps you monetize your products and services, reach customers, and grow your business.

These articles cover the basics of creating and using your Partner Center account. This includes creating new Software as a Service (SaaS) offers that can be listed on Azure Marketplace or Microsoft AppSource, managing your existing SaaS offers, and providing resources to help with questions and collect your feedback.

plans.summary: Fully managed azure load testing service
plans.description:
Azure Load Testing Service enables developers and testers to generate high-scale load that reveal actionable insights into app performance, scalability, and capacity with a fully managed service. It provides: -

  • Simplified, cloud-based load testing with high fidelity support for JMeter
  • Comprehensive view of curated client and server metrics with actionable insights into app performance
  • Integration with CI/CD workflows for automated, collaborative load-testing
  • Streamlined billing and test management that builds on existing Azure conventions

value.longSummary: Azure Load Test Service is Azure's fully-managed service that enables you to create, run, and analyze load tests that are optimized for Azure-hosted applications.

plans.summary: Create a Lab that contains your team's templates and policies.
plans.description:
DevTest Labs enables development teams to efficiently self-manage virtual machines (VMs) and Azure resource manager (ARM) based resources while staying within security policies and guardrails defined by central admins. Developers can create resources from pre-configured templates with the latest software bits and IT approved tools in minutes as opposed to waiting for days or weeks. Central admins on the other hand, can embed policies, budgets and schedules on these resources to minimize waste and control costs.

  • Quickly provision virtual machines and Azure services (ARM based) for development and testing
  • Easily integrate your deployment pipeline with DevTest Labs to provision on-demand environments.
  • Get going quickly using virtual machines from pre-created pools
  • Minimize wastes with lab, virtual machine level quotas and policies
  • Set automated shutdowns to minimize costs

plans.summary: Create a Lab that contains your team's templates and policies.
plans.description:
DevTest Labs for Blockchain as a Service helps developers and testers to quickly create virtual machines in Azure to deploy and test their blockchain applications. You can easily provision Windows and Linux machines using reusable templates while minimizing waste and controlling cost.

  • Supports public, private and consortium blockchains
  • Quickly provision development and test virtual machines
  • Minimize waste with quotas and policies
  • Set automated shutdowns to minimize costs
  • Create a VM in a few clicks with reusable templates
  • Get going quickly using VMs from pre-created pools
  • Build Windows and Linux virtual machines

value.longSummary: A unified solution for remotely verifying the trustworthiness of a platform.
value.summary: A unified solution for remotely verifying the trustworthiness of a platform.
value.description:
Azure Attestation is a unified solution for remotely verifying the trustworthiness of a platform and integrity of the binaries running inside it. The service receives evidence from the platform, validates it with security standards, evaluates it against configurable policies, and produces an attestation token for claims-based applications (e.g., relying parties, auditing authorities).

Azure Attestation offers the following benefits:

  • Supports attestation of multiple platforms
  • Offers default providers to simplify the attestation process
  • Allows creation of custom providers with user-defined policies

plans.summary: Enables users to generate high-scale load and run simulations to get actionable insights with a fully managed service.
plans.description:
Azure Load Testing enables developers and testers to generate high-scale load, identify performance bottlenecks, get actionable insights into app resiliency and to integrate performance testing with CI/CD pipelines. It provides: -

  • Simplified, cloud-based load testing for HTTP requests.
  • Advanced load testing from multiple regions using existing JMeter & Locust scripts with high fidelity support.
  • Integration into CI/CD workflows to catch and block performance issues early in the development lifecycle.
  • Comprehensive view of curated client-side and server-side metrics with actionable insights into app performance.
  • Ability to download test results/ reports for offline viewing and collaboration.
  • Load Test private endpoints.

value.longSummary: Azure Load Test Service is Azure's fully managed service that enables you to create, run, and analyze load tests that are optimized for Azure-hosted applications.

plans.description:
CloudMoyo Rail Operational Testing System (OTS) simplifies rail operational and efficiency test management programs in entirety, by facilitating the planning, execution, and reporting of tests in a cloud-based environment. This ensures 100% compliance to federal safety guidelines, such as FRA and FTA rules, GCOR, MoW, SSI, Haz-Mat, and Train Ride and Efficiencies. This solution enables inspectors to record the results of tests (including drug and alcohol tests) on hand-held devices, in real time.

CloudMoyo OTS addresses the challenges in rail operational testing by automating key processes and providing a flexible platform with a simple yet intuitive interface capable of giving role-based access to multiple hierarchies in order to configure or modify test plans and assign them to test inspectors, all with flexibility for localization and safety best practices. This helps with more efficient rail freight passenger railway operations. With this modern cloud based platform, you now have the ability to conduct tests in guided manner and report the feedback real time with interactive dashboards. Rules libraries can be pre-imported, while notifications and alerts help you identify compliance breaches and root causes.

Features:

  • Pre-populated rules library – Mass import custom tests or leverage a ready-to-use knowledge base/rules library for GCOR, MoW, Haz-Mat, and SSI
  • Integrations – Seamlessly connects with business systems like SAP, ERP, HRMS, etc.
  • Rapid test plan creation – Quickly configure rules and rapidly create test plans
  • Test execution and assessment – Rapidly execute tests with guided interface for test inspectors
  • Multi-device compatibility - intuitive interface compatible on mobile, tablet, and desktop
  • Notification and alerts – E-mail and SMS-based notifications and alerts for all major incidences
  • Dynamic dashboards – Get a 360° view of parameters associated with a test program in real time


Benefits of CloudMoyo OTS:

  • 20% decline in safety incidents through proactive testing
  • 35% improvement in crew productivity
  • Real-time reporting of test programs.
  • Interactive and intuitive UI for rapid, trigger-based, and repeatable programs
  • Reduced training costs and evaluation cycle time
  • Eliminates manual testing efforts as well as time-consuming, error-prone paperwork.
  • Improved compliance with FRA and FTA rail safety guidelines and GCOR (General Code of Operating Rules)
  • Higher enforcement of safety rules and best practices, reduced penalties, and increased safety

plans.description:
OpenText™ Core Performance Engineering is a cloud-based load and performance testing solution that makes it easy to plan, run, and scale performance tests. It’s the simple, smart, and scalable approach to modern testing as you can run tests in less than 10 minutes, scale for large loads, and understand an application’s performance through comprehensive analytics.

Key Capabilities

  • Simple

OpenText™ Core Performance Engineering makes it easy to design and create load tests- from the point at which you sign up for the service, you can start your first load test in less than 10 minutes, without the need to schedule, deploy, and manage load generators.

Smart

OpenText™ Core Performance Engineering uses predictive analytics to help you understand anomalies and problems in real time. The intuitive analytics allow you to easily interpret the test results to identify the performance of an application and then determine your mitigation options

  • Scalable

OpenText™ Core Performance Engineering can scale to HUGE – it automatically enables you to scale from one to 5,000,000 or more geographically distributed virtual users and you can add or remove them during test runs.

For more information, please visit https://software.microfocus.com/software/stormrunner-load

plans.description:
Neal Analytics Inventory Optimization, built on the Microsoft Cloud, offers CPG companies and Retailers a new way to manage product portfolios in their business - driving a significant increase in sales and revenue.

Determine the best performing SKUs for each outlet or market

Identify which products are the best fit for each market segment and compare segment portfolios to ensure the distribution and market penetration of top-performing SKUs is optimized.

Model across customer and product segments

A scalable solution that can handle millions of SKUs and customers by segmenting sales data into peer groups for detailed comparisons. From high-level comparisons of online vs physical, to the granular selection of specific products that perfectly fit a demographic, this will allow your buyers, sellers, and product managers to make more informed decisions daily.

Valuable insights for Retailers and CPG companies

For retailers, you can augment and support product portfolio planning, trending product DNA, inventory allocation, and buying decisions. For CPG companies, you can identify which markets are right for each product, identify which products are winning in their markets, which low distribution products are most worthy of more priority, and which products are due for retirement.

value.longSummary: Put the right products on every shelf at every outlet to satisfy ever-evolving customer demands

plans.displayName: Agility CMS - The Fastest Headless CMS
plans.description:
Agility CMS is a leading SaaS Headless CMS (content management system) that makes it fast and easy to build, manage, and maintain your content, wherever it needs to be. 

Agility CMS helps customers adopt a Content First Methodology.  This means Website or App front-ends can be rewritten easily without changing the content in Agility CMS. This enables a future where you never have to rebuild their website from scratch ever again. By starting off with great Content Architecture, customers can create the right Content Definitions with the kinds of Content Relationships that will stand the test of time. Content that serves as a single source of truth can be placed in a Content Warehouse so it can be made available anywhere. Content that is designed specifically for a Website, App, Line of Business, or Organizational Segment, can be placed in a Property Instance.

  • With built-in Page Management, Agility CMS roll can help out solutions faster while managing everything from one central platform with unlimited flexibility and scale.
  • Agility CMS helps customers and partners to cut down the development time by up to 95% for developing and launching content to multiple platforms.
  • Agility CMS focuses on JAMstack, but developers can choose any development platform and framework (we offer starters for GatsbyJS, NextJS, NuxtJS, ReactJS, VueJS, Vanilla JS).
  • The APIs are open standards and flexible. Websites, apps, etc. are all separated and hosted in environments that can have unlimited scalability. The APIs and files between Agility and these environments are blazing fast, running through CDN’s and in the best scenario running statically generated websites that reduce latency, improve speed and ensure uptime.

Agility CMS's key differentiators evolve around three promises: faster, easier and more secure.

plans.description:
Applitools is the creator of Application Visual Management (AVM) to help companies release, test and monitor flawless mobile, web, and native apps in a fully automated way. Founded in 2013, Applitools uses sophisticated AI-powered image processing technology to ensure that an application appears correctly and functions properly on all mobile devices, browsers, operating systems, and screen sizes.

Applitools' Visual AI engine mimics the human eye and brain to avoid undetected visual bugs, minimizing false positive bug alerts. Applitools Eyes can instantly validate entire application pages and detect layout issues on even the most complex and dynamic pages. When development teams are confident they can fix visual bugs faster, they are unleashed to push more high-quality code than ever before.

Applitools has customers from a range of verticals, including Fortune 100 companies in software, banking, online retail, insurance, and pharmaceuticals. Applitools is headquartered in San Mateo, California, with an R&D center in Tel Aviv, Israel. For more information, please visit applitools.com.

plans.description:
This application is available in English, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Arabic, Thai, Dutch, Italian, Swedish, Norwegian, and Finnish. Additional languages are added continuously and can be added upon request.

DIGITAL ASSESSMENT FOR ALL TYPES OF DEVICES AND OS
Dugga is an easy-to-use, flexible, and secure digital system for all types of Tests, Exams, Assignments, Quizzes, Homework and High-Stake Exams. Dugga is platform independent and operating system independent and supports Windows/PC, Mac/OSX, Chromebook/Chrome OS and iPad/IOS. The assessment platform allows teachers to spend more quality time with their students and improve learning outcomes.

OUR MISSION
Our mission is to help schools improve quality in assessment.

VALUE PROPOSITION AND TARGET GROUP
We help teachers save time with assessment and increase learning outcomes.
We do so by offering a one-stop examination platform for all types of exams/tests for schools (K-12), colleges & universities.

Teachers can assess their students in a secure and easy-to-use way, from assignments, diagnostic tests to national exams. Choose from various question types such as drag-and-drop, multiple choice, single choice, matching, essay, fill in the gap, math, chemistry, GeoGebra, order, missing word and many more. With its many different question types, teachers can create, schedule and grade any type of test or assignment, all in one place. Teachers can also share and correct exams together with other teachers. Get your Dugga account today!

plans.description:
We made the new Microsoft Office 2019/365 practice tests a much more powerful instrument for assessing student skills and preparing students for real-world applications.

Microsoft is a leader in office productivity software, offering busy professionals the tools they need to collaborate and present their ideas in the workplace. Whether it is editing a document using Word, organizing numbers with Excel and Access, sharing emails with coworkers using Outlook, or developing engaging and interactive presentations using PowerPoint, or sharing information viaSharePoint and OneNote. Microsoft Office knowledge and skills are critical in today's fast-paced digital economy.

Becoming a Microsoft Office Specialist tells the world about your expertise in critical Microsoft Office products. By leveraging the Microsoft brand, you can stand out from the corporate crowd, attract and win new business opportunities, and get your resume noticed.

GMetrix has created world-class practice tests to provide to our students with the tools to pass the the official Microsoft Office Specialists (MOS) certifications. GMetrix offers a full live-in-the-app experience, so you will have the confidence to pass the actual MOS certification exams with flying colors!

Includes

  • Word 2019/365
  • Excel 2019/365
  • PowerPoint 2019/365
  • Outlook 2019/365
  • Access 2019/365
  • Word Expert 2019/365
  • Excel Expert 2019/365

Requirements

  • Windows Vista, Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, or Windows 10
  • Full installation of Office 2019/365 (not compatible with Office Mobile or Office Online)
  • GMetrix SMS current version 6.1 installed
  • High-speed Internet connection
  • Prior coursework or experience with Office 2016 is recommended.

value.longSummary: Helping students and professionals gain a competitive edge with leading MOS exam prep tools.

plans.description:
INNSPECT TV & MEDIA

InnSpect provides full cross-technology testing capabilities and focuses on measuring the Quality of Experience and Quality of Service.

InnSpect combines a No-Code and Artificial Intelligence automation approach to increase test coverage, reduce costs, improve time to market and customer satisfaction.

 

InnSpect addresses critical pain areas:
- INEFFICIENT TESTING
Manual testing is simply inefficient, teams work hard but simply can’t catch up with all the regression sprints and parallel builds testing. Team scalability is only a temporary fix and comes with a cost. Defects are found in production and fixing them is a slow process.
- SPIRALLING QA COSTS
Encountering defects on a late phase of a new feature to be release can significantly increase your releases costs, easily getting out of hands. Prior automation initiatives have failed to deliver the cost/time benefits advertise as test scripts are hard to maintain updated
- SLOW TIME TO MARKET
Manual testing and late identification of problems keeps preventing production release dates to be met?
Are new releases development constantly being delayed and failing to meet administration and clients expectations?

 

InnSpect brings enormous benefits:
- FOCUS ON CORE BUSINESS
Your team focus on your customers’ satisfaction, products/services and IT strategy. InnSpect automation capabilities can take over any routine tasks and E2E testing needs that consumes your team precious time.
- REDUCE TIME TO MARKET
By using automation best practices and 24/7 test execution, you achieve a much greater test coverage in shorter test cycles
- FLEXIBLE SIZING AND RESPONSIVENESS
When scaling up your team is no longer an option InnSpect test automation can fill help you keeping the work done and on time. Chose the InnSpect setup more appropriate to your needs and never miss a deadline again.

 

InnSpect is 100% Azure

plans.displayName: User Experience Testing for Microsoft Teams
plans.description:
IR's Collaborate user experience validation testing services deliver cloud-based scalability and availability testing for Microsoft Teams and other communications and contact center platforms.  Ensure your Teams solution is delivering flawless user experience when join and participating in calls and meetings, or contact center customer-agent interactions.. 

Collaborate HeartBeat™ ensures you can maintain the quality of the user experience once you’re confident customer interactions are performing as you intended by testing availability and quality every hour, day or week from the outside-in, simulating actual human interactions

Collaborate StressTest™ gives you the insight you need to understand, manage, tune and verify contact center performance under load.  IVR and contact center systems are tested from the outside-in, giving the customers’ perspective of performance under real-world conditions.

plans.description:
Visium Load is a high capacity performance and load test tool that ensures your software scales up perfectly under heavy load.
Specially designed for high capacity performance tests. DevOps&Agile Teams could conduct their performance and load tests within development and production environments.
Benefits of conducting load & performance test
You have to make sure that you give your customers the amusing experience they need to stay with your application, despite the limited tolerance and short attention span.
  • Increase customer satisfaction
Nearly half of users expect a website to load in 2 seconds. 40% give up completely if it takes more than 3 seconds.
  • Be part of DevOps journey
Make sure new features will not impact your application's usual performance by integrating load test within your CI/CD DevOps pipelines.
  • Be prepared for high traffic
Align with your marketing team and be ready for unexpected mishaps and traffic spikes
  • Keep your IT budget under control!
Optimize hardware and software costs through accurate capacity metrics.
Why you should prefer Visium Load?
Use your own cloud accounts
Our platform provides the flexibility to connect with your existing MS Azure accounts.  
Pay as you go!
Our credit-based payment model gives you flexible budget planning.
Weighted test suit support
Group your test scenarios in test suites and assign weights based on real-life usage.
Features
Multi-Geo Location
To obtain the most realistic results, required traffic would be generated from different locations of the world simultaneously.
Saas Platform
No installation, setup, or hardware! Just use your web browser to start your load tests.
Real-time Monitoring & Reporting
Monitor test status and resource utilization with our user-friendly dashboards and real-time reporting.
JMeter Plugin Support
Support for adding custom JMeter Plugins(ie.Parallel Sampler)
CI/CD Integration
CI / CD integration can be easily achieved through our restful API endpoints.
Network Simulation
Simulation of different type of network technologies to understand true end-user experiences such as bandwidth limitations, packet drop rate and latency.
Dedicated Ip’s
Dedicated IP support in order not to define firewall rules before each and every test run.

Web site

https://visiumlabs.com/visium-load/

plans.description:
Open Data. Optimised.

Accelerate your analytics with UK open datasets that have been optimised for analytical workloads. Our datasets include NHS prescribing activity, UK road traffic accident statistics (i.e. road safety), and MOT test results.

Maximise Productivity

We provide data services to make market researchers 100x more productive compared to working with raw open data sources directly.

Slash Costs

Alleviate the costs and friction associated with using raw open datasets for secondary or desk research. Enable your market researchers to deliver more now.

Use Freely

All our datasets are openly licensed and free to use for any lawful purpose. From market research start-ups to the largest market research companies, you have the same freedoms.

Query Interactively

Copy our data files to Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 using our Azure storage integration for low-latency queries from Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Databricks, and other data lakehouse engines.

Example Use Cases

Our open datasets can be used to support several areas of market research including:

  • Pharma Markets: Answer questions like 'how is pharma brand x performing with drug y compared to equivalents from the competition?' and 'should the marketing push for pharma product y be increased or reduced?'
  • Prescribing Spend: Answer questions like 'which Sustainability and Transformation Partnerships (STPs) are spending the most?' and 'how much could be saved by prescribing more generic products?'
  • Cycle Safety: Answer questions like 'what conditions contribute most to the severity of a cycling crash?' and 'which junctions are hotspots for severe cycling crashes?'
  • Vehicle Maintenance: Answer questions like 'which vehicle parts are most likely to fail an MOT test?' and 'which vehicles would benefit from a maintenance service combined with an MOT test?'
  • Vehicle Ownership: Answer questions like 'what is the average mileage per year as a vehicle ages and how does this differ by vehicle make and model?' and 'what are the most long-lived vehicles?'

You can learn more about these and other use cases here.

plans.displayName: IBM X-Force Red Cloud Offensive Testing Services for Microsoft Azure
plans.summary: X-Force Red Cloud Testing Security Services offers offensive security services which include penetration testing, vulnerability management services, red teaming, code reviews, and static analysis.
plans.description:
IBM Security Services X-Force Red Cloud Testing Services can uncover and help fix cloud vulnerabilities and misconfigurations that may expose your most valuable data to attackers. With more companies moving to public, hybrid or multi-cloud environments, misconfigured cloud services and assets become more commonplace. Developers who focus on delivering a production application under strict deadlines, may use suboptimal coding practices (such as poor secrets management) or fail to enforce the principle of least privileges. Many companies also incorrectly assume their Cloud Service Providers (CSPs) are responsible for building security into their products. While CSPs offer security tools for their customers, those controls are not one-size-fits-all and are not tailored “out-of-the-box” to protect each company’s unique requirements around data protection. This is true even in cases where cloud services are provided as a fully managed offering (PaaS) by a CSP, where security controls may be included as part of the service, however, companies may not be configuring them properly. X-Force Red is an autonomous team of veteran hackers, within IBM Security, hired to break into organizations and uncover risky vulnerabilities that criminal attackers may use for personal gain. Our goal is to help security leaders identify and remediate security flaws, covering their entire digital and physical ecosystem. X-Force Red can complement your in-house team as the X-Force Red performs adversary simulation exercises for many of the world’s largest organizations that have mature testing programs and internal red teams. Additionally, X-Force Red:
  • Brings unique tooling and experience testing industry peers
  • Leverages experience to bring a new perspective and different testing skills to augment the internal team’s capabilities
  • Performs knowledge sharing with internal team
  • Brings a third-party perspective that doesn’t have background knowledge of the environment; has no assumptions about staff and technologies
  • Provides perspective of how an advanced external adversary would perform intel gathering and different post exploitation TTPs against the environment, separate from the knowledge the internal team has already gained
The X-Force Red Portal gives security leaders one place to view their vulnerability data, schedule/change tests and share information with each other and testers. Additional benefits of the portal include:
  • One view of test progress and findings keeps security and testing teams on the same page
  • Agility in testing scope; Can change testing scope without re-signing contracts
  • Flexible scheduling means customers schedule tests based on their preferred timeframe
  • Comprehensive report findings, evidence and remediation recommendations are conveniently hosted for easy, always-on access
Demo: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1kOZVEOiaKY Our unified approach provides a centralized service to:
Identify cloud assets Uncover vulnerabilities and manage the remediation effort across multiple teams & locations.
Asset inventory & vulnerability management Continually discover & prioritize cloud assets that matter to most to your organization. Built by hackers Vulnerabilities prioritized based on an attacker mindset - how attackers could use them, if they are exploiting them, what they could access and how difficult it would be. Wide-range of expertise Test networks, applications and personnel to uncover and fix vulnerabilities exposing your cloud environment to attackers X-Force® Red Portal Schedule, change scope, view findings and recommendations from one location Flexibility Subscription model with monthly fixed rate Explore More: https://www.ibm.com/security/partners/microsoft-azure

plans.description:
This Office and SharePoint Addin requires a working version of Inflectra's SpiraTest®, SpiraTeam®, and SpiraPlan® (SpiraPlan). This Office and SharePoint Addin is designed to integrate with SpiraPlan to extend its functionality. It can connect to cloud or on-premise versions of SpiraPlan. It lets you retrieve your assigned Test Cases and Test Sets for a specific product in SpiraPlan. You can run your tests straight away or later. When you are ready you can send your test executions back to SpiraPlan.

SpiraPlan combines test management, requirements traceability & bug-tracking helping your entire team collaborate on product releases to manage the entire application lifecycle. SpiraPlan is an enterprise grade commercial product, but free trials are available.

Use Playwright Testing to:

  • Automate tests as part of your continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) workflow.

plans.description:
Compliance Tracker 365 is a purpose-built solution for organisations that need to ensure attestation of essential SharePoint content. Whether it’s policies, procedures, or compliance updates, CT365 helps you target the right audience, track readership, and report on engagement—all within your Microsoft 365 environment.

Key Features

  • Target - Identify and assign critical content to specific users or groups in SharePoint.

  • Track - Monitor who has and hasn’t read important documents, ensuring compliance visibility.

  • Report - Generate detailed dashboards and exportable reports for audits and governance.

Why Compliance Tracker 365?

  • Built exclusively for SharePoint content—no extra platforms required.

  • Provides real-time compliance insights for managers and administrators.

  • Supports regulatory and internal policy adherence with transparent reporting.

  • Seamlessly integrates with Microsoft 365 security and permissions.

Benefits

  • Reduce compliance risk by ensuring mandatory content is acknowledged.

  • Save time with automated tracking and reporting.

  • Improve accountability across teams and departments.

Extend Compliance Beyond Policies

Compliance Tracker 365 isn’t limited to mandatory documents—it works across all SharePoint content, including news posts, announcements, and critical updates. Target specific audiences, track engagement automatically in the background, and know exactly who is interacting with your content.

Whether it’s new training material, a leadership message, or an urgent operational update, CT365 ensures your communication reaches the right people and provides clear visibility into who’s engaging and who’s not.

Price

Free 30-day trial license issued within the app. Paid plans start at $1 USD/user/month.

Implementation

The Compliance Tracker 365 solution consists of:

  • My Reads web part - displays a list of documents and pages that you need to read

  • Read Profile web part - allows staff to select terms of interest when personal profiles are configured

  • Page Tracker - allow staff to acknowledge when they have read a document or page from an application customizer in the page footer

  • Compliance Tracker 365 lists - 4 SharePoint lists that store the configuration and logs used by Compliance Tracker 365

  • Compliance Tracker 365 list view command set - access the Management page and document information panel, to configuring trackers and view reports, directly from within libraries

  • Compliance Tracker 365 Management - a set of pages for administrators to configure the solution and to access reports

The solution integrates with the PnP Modern Search web parts to show read tags on search results. This requires the installation of two additional apps - PnP Modern Search web part & Compliance Tracker 365 PnP Search Extension. Read how to integrate in our docs site https://docs.compliancetracker365.com/additional-information/pnp-search-integration/.

All Compliance Tracker 365 documentation is available at https://docs.compliancetracker365.com

Latest change log is available at https://docs.compliancetracker365.com/changelog

Note: The solution does not deploy tenant wide. Add it to each site where Compliance Tracker 365 is to be used.

Contact us for a demonstration or for setup assistance.

plans.description:
iBORG is a platform-independent comprehensive software for automating your business processes and testing operations. Its standout features like Scheduling, Encryption, Automated Data collection and Multifaceted complex test automation make it a much more dynamic solution than its peers. It is an all-in-one cost-effective, high-efficiency, and reliable solution that boosts productivity. iBORG’s industry-leading native Robotic Process Automation (RPA) capabilities will help you seamlessly automate even the most complex business workflows by wholesomely emulating human interaction with the application’s user interface.

Many organizations require the completion of routine tasks that are essential to the operation. These tasks typically take up a large portion of an employee's time and are prone to human mistakes. Such tasks are required in every organization, regardless of sector, for example, EOD tasks in banks; Payroll, DB Spool, and so on. Because automation is now a necessity in every industry, the product's market potential and opportunity are enormous.

iBORG helps businesses to automate their processes be it automating the test scripts for QA or booking the flight tickets for the customers. iBORG’s AI and ML features make it a one-stop automation tool for all processes by seamlessly integrating with various software. It is a mix of Robotic Process Automation, Robotic Test Automation, and Robotic Mobile Automation. It can perform varied tasks on any device which a normal bot can't do.

Try Now: https://www.iborg.us/

Annual subscription for NowSecure Platform Advanced hosted software for static, dynamic and interactive testing for one mobile app on two platforms (Android and iOS). Includes the ability to configure test credentials, PII, search terms and other app navigation needs. Supports uploading app versions and monitoring for the same app in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. Includes standard CI/CD integration and user-defined configuration options.

Annual subscription for Premium product support, providing: Dedicated Technical Account Manager; Initial product onboarding and annual training; Support for native integration implementation; API level support; Expert mobile security consultation to assist in achieving internal milestones as requested; Product roadmap update, review, and alignment.

value.longSummary: Automated continuous security testing for mobile apps in GitHub, Azure DevOps & all DevSecOps Pipes
value.description:
NowSecure provides cloud-based automated mobile app security testing for dev & security teams on-demand and in DevSecOps continuous testing scenarios. Now you can build and deploy mobile apps faster with the confidence that security and privacy are built in.

NowSecure has pre-built integrations with most CI/CD tools, including Microsoft Azure DevOps and a GitHub Action to integrate directly into the GitHub Advanced Security interface, enabling developers to kick off an assessment and receive results directly in GitHub Workflows. NowSecure also has APIs available so it can integrate into any development pipeline.

Key features:
  • Security test any iOS/Android app binary (.ipa, .aab, or .apk)
  • Supports Kotlin, Swift, Java, ObjectiveC & any other mobile app language
  • All-in-one mobile SAST+DAST+IAST+APISec+SBOM generation
  • Analyzes all code including 3rd party SDKs & transitive dependencies
  • Tickets w/ embedded dev guide & sample code to fix fast
  • False Positive Rate of <1%

    • For GitHub Developers:
    • Customizable, out of the box GitHub Action
    • Configure to run analysis on every push or pull request
    • Receive results in your GitHub Advanced Security tab

plans.description:
testRigor is a cloud-based no-code holistic solution for UI end-to-end automated testing. It’s built with modern AI technology allowing anyone on the team to create, modify, and maintain automated tests using simple English commands.

Key features:

  • Initial framework setup is nearly instant

  • Create compex end-to-end tests 15x faster than with other widely known automation frameworks

  • Test web, native and hybrid mobile apps, and APIs. Build cross-browser and cross-platform tests based on your needs

  • AI engine caters to ultra-stable and reliable tests

  • All tests are written from end user’s perspective without any reliance on implementation details

  • Refer to UI elements as you see them on the screen, not by XPaths or CSS Selectors

  • Tests survive underlying framework changes: refactor, update functionality, or even pivot to another frameworks with almost no influence on tests

  • Test maintenance is nearly eliminated. Existing customers spend on average 99.5% less time on maintenance than with Selenium

  • Seamlessly integrate with CI tools, databases, and issue management systems (Jira, TestRail, CircleCI, Applitools, Oracle, PagerDuty and many more)

plans.summary: We deliver a best-in-class application by superseding all the business and technical challenges of the customer with a deep understanding of the customer's business to provide the right solution.
plans.description: Our technical professionals have substantial expertise across various development models. We take ownership to deliver a best-in-class application by superseding all the business and technical challenges of the customer with a deep understanding of the customer's business to provide the right solution at a quick turnaround time. • Application Development • Application Engineering • Application Modernization • Application Migration • Application Re-engineering The following phases are applicable for all application services and are based on the Industry best practices and Agile methodologies to deliver a high-quality application with Cost-effective distributed and mixed resources. Our technology experts are committed to providing the best value for our customers irrespective of any challenges by overcoming the right solution. 1. Discovery Phase: During this preliminary phase, our dedicated team of experts will find out the details necessary to determine the scope of work and time frames and prepare a plan for the end-to-end project execution to deliver a quality product/application as per our customer's needs. 2. UI/UX Design Phase: With our creative designers, we will bring our customer's design virtual thoughts or imagination to reality and match them with the customer's expectations. 3. Development / Migration / Modernization / Coding & Build: Our specialized technology developers will create a successful application that customers and their End-Users will need. Our team will analyze the target audience's uncovered pains. Based on the analysis, our team of experts will recommend the best-in-class solutions and develop a user-friendly solution with an attentive approach. Building sustainable applications, API integration services, Payment gateway integration, Azure Services, Progressive web app solutions, web development, legacy system modernization and digital transformation, platform and application Migration, frontend and backend development, IoT development, AI and ML development are the key strength of our robust technical team. 4. Testing Phase: There is no compromise on the application or product quality whatsoever. Our certified testing professionals perform all the relevant testing based on the application and users' needs. Generally focusing on Cross-Platform testing, Browser compatible testing, Features & Functionality testing, Front-end & backend testing, Regression, Stress, Load, and Performance Testing, with an Automated Test Suite in Azure DevOps wherever applicable, developed by our testing professionals. 5. Deployment Phase: Based on the customer's business goals, our DevOps experts recommend the best deployment model, which is considered successful, say, with downtime, without downtime, roll-out changes to an environment, environment separation, backward compatibility, and more. Value Proposition: Cloud Assert ensures to provide a valuable service to all our customers across the globe by providing a rich User and Customer experience in all our developed applications, Insight market reach, advanced development strategies, transparent Agile Processes, developing top-range technologies, and frameworks. It offers valuable results to customers' businesses with the flexibility to extend our services per the customer's need and not compromise on the quality and security standards.

plans.summary: Optimized AlmaLinux 9 for Azure with cloud-init, strong security and fast boot. RHEL-compatible, ideal for cloud, web apps, databases and APIs.
plans.description: This is a minimal ready-to-use ProComputers packaged AlmaLinux 9 image automatically updated at launch with latest patches making sure you are always running the most secure version available. Mainly used as a common base system on top of which other appliances could be built and tested, it contains just enough packages to run within Azure, bring up an SSH Server and allow users to login. AlmaLinux 9 is a stable, secure, RHEL-compatible Linux OS designed for enterprise environments. Perfect for cloud deployments, web hosting, databases and servers, it provides long-term support, robust security updates, and an easy migration path from CentOS, ensuring reliability and performance.

value.longSummary: AlmaLinux 9 is a stable, secure, RHEL-compatible Linux OS designed for enterprise environments. Perfect for cloud deployments, web hosting, databases and servers, it provides long-term support, robust security updates, and an easy migration path from CentOS, ensuring reliability and performance.
value.summary: Optimized AlmaLinux 9 for Azure with cloud-init, strong security and fast boot. RHEL-compatible, ideal for cloud, web apps, databases and APIs.
value.description:
AlmaLinux 9 Latest image

This is a minimal ready to use ProComputers packaged AlmaLinux 9 image automatically updated at launch with latest patches making sure you are always running the most secure version available. Mainly used as a common base system on top of which other appliances could be built and tested, it contains just enough packages to run within Azure, bring up an SSH Server and allow users to login.

AlmaLinux 9 - Enterprise-Grade, Community-Driven Linux for Cloud and Servers

AlmaLinux 9 is a stable, open-source, and community-governed Linux distribution built to deliver full binary compatibility with Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) 9. Designed for enterprises, hosting providers and developers, AlmaLinux9 ensures a reliable platform with predictable long-term support. It's a trusted choice for migrating from CentOS and running secure, scalable cloud applications on Microsoft Azure and beyond.

Key Features of AlmaLinux 9

  • Minimal base image with bug-for-bug compatibility with RHEL 9.
  • Cloud-init enabled for Microsoft Azure automation and provisioning.
  • Optimized for fast boot times on Azure Managed Disks.
  • Secure by default: SELinux enforced, SSH hardened, minimal packages installed.
  • Accelerated Networking support for high-throughput, low-latency connections.

Benefits of Using AlmaLinux 9

  • Ideal for modern enterprise Linux workloads on Azure Virtual Machines.
  • Maintained by an active and transparent AlmaLinux open-source community.
  • Long-term security updates and stability for production environments.
  • Lightweight and efficient for development, testing, and production deployments.

Use Cases for AlmaLinux 9

  • Deploy scalable web servers with Apache, Nginx, PHP, or Python.
  • Run CMS platforms such as WordPress, Drupal, or Joomla.
  • Host e-commerce solutions including Magento or PrestaShop.
  • Launch production-ready databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB.
  • Power LAMP/LEMP stacks for custom application deployments.
  • Host static websites and dynamic apps with backend logic.
  • Build automated CI/CD pipelines using Ansible, Terraform, and Azure DevOps.
  • Deploy RESTful APIs and backend frameworks like Node.js or Django.

Conclusion

AlmaLinux 9 delivers a secure, predictable, and enterprise-grade Linux experience with full RHEL binary compatibility. Whether you're migrating from CentOS or launching new workloads in the cloud, this AlmaLinux 9 image ensures reliability, performance, and community-driven innovation.

Other minimal ready-to-use images:

If this Rocky Linux 9 image does not suit your needs, please choose another one from our popular image list below:

  • Oracle Linux 8 image on Azure
  • Oracle Linux 9 image on Azure
  • Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) 8 image on Azure
  • Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) 9 image on Azure
  • AlmaLinux 8 image on Azure
  • AlmaLinux 9 image on Azure
  • Rocky Linux 8 image on Azure
  • Rocky Linux 9 image on Azure
  • CentOS Stream 9 image on Azure

Why choose ProComputers?

With over 10 years of experience working with Microsoft Azure, ProComputers provides open-source software bundled together into solutions ready to be launched on-demand in the cloud.

ProComputers is a proud sponsor of the AlmaLinux OS Foundation and the Rocky Enterprise Software Foundation.
